faqs.question: Why do I have flies in my Garden City South home?
faqs.answer: Flies are attracted to food sources, moisture, and organic waste. In Garden City South, common causes include garbage storage areas, pet waste, compost bins, fruit trees, and entry through gaps around doors and windows. The area's mature landscaping and proximity to restaurants can also contribute to higher fly populations during summer months.
